decisions.title: Key Vault RBAC targets do not exist in Phase 2
decisions.note: auto-applied (must_fix is mandatory); UAMIs (web, api, deploy) now created in Phase 1 via new identity.bicep; KV RBAC role assignments moved into webapps.bicep (Phase 4) where principalIds are stable Phase 1 outputs

decisions.title: Public-edge baseline is not enforceable from the infra plan
decisions.note: auto-applied (must_fix is mandatory); Easy Auth v2 with Return401 configured declaratively on web + API + admin apps; admin endpoints split into a dedicated App Service (api-admin) with corp-only IP allow-list; rate-limiting documented as APIM/AFD upgrade path

decisions.title: SQL grant deployment script lacks PE-safe identity and network path
decisions.note: auto-applied (must_fix is mandatory); new sqlgrant.bicep runs a deploymentScript bound to snet-deploy with UAMI-deploy identity; SQL publicNetworkAccess remains Disabled throughout; AAD SQL admin group membership for UAMI-deploy added as Phase 1 manual prereq

decisions.title: azd phases lack deploymentPhase parameter path
decisions.note: auto-applied (must_fix is mandatory); deploymentPhase default changed to 1; per-phase main.phase{N}.bicepparam files added; azure.yaml env renamed to nordic-foods-dev; explicit operator runbook documents the per-phase azd provision invocation

decisions.title: SQL grant script lacks sqlcmd runtime
decisions.note: auto-applied (must_fix is mandatory, iter 2 of 2 cap); azure-cli image pinned to 2.61.0 and sqlgrant.bicep script body prepends an mssql-tools18 bootstrap from packages.microsoft.com before invoking sqlcmd; bootstrap validates with command -v sqlcmd

decisions.title: SQL grant bootstrap targets wrong OS (Alpine vs Debian)
decisions.note: user-directed (option 1 of 3): replaced ad-hoc apt bootstrap with a prebuilt custom container image (parameter customGrantImage) that bundles az + sqlcmd; image build instructions documented inline in the plan; CodeGen selects the matching base+package-manager at build time
decisions.user_choice: Custom prebuilt image with az + sqlcmd

decisions.title: Zone-redundant App Service plan uses one instance
decisions.note: user-directed (option 2 of 2): dropped zoneRedundant=true to preserve the 1-instance MVP cost envelope; explicitly downgraded the compute SLA claim from 99.95% (AZ) to 99.9% (single-instance); documented the upgrade path (capacity=2 + zoneRedundant=true) as a load-test-triggered post-MVP action
decisions.user_choice: Drop zoneRedundant; keep 1-instance MVP cost profile

decisions.title: Public-edge rate limiting remains non-deployable
decisions.note: User deferred; Easy Auth covers anonymous blocking. Documented gap; revisit if peak load proves rate-limit necessary (APIM Consumption or AFD Standard as upgrade path).

decisions.title: Security table contradicts UAMI design
decisions.note: Security Configuration table row for Identity updated to UAMI; Public ingress and Admin surface rows revised to reflect Easy Auth + dedicated admin app.

decisions.title: snet-deploy output wiring incomplete
decisions.note: network.bicep outputs expanded to include snetDeployId/snetDeployName and corresponding snetApp/snetPe names for completeness.

decisions.title: Project defaults weaken template repeatability
decisions.note: projectName parameter no longer has a default; main.bicep requires explicit value.

decisions.title: API allow-list depends on unstable web outbound IPs
decisions.note: Chose token-based service-to-service authz (Easy Auth + caller-claim check on uamiWebPrincipalId) instead of NAT Gateway; no cost impact; web->API IP restriction dropped.

decisions.title: P1v3 + SQL S3 capacity lacks load-validation gate
decisions.note: User deferred; load test will be ad-hoc post-deploy. Documented S3->S4/Redis trigger remains in Step 2 artifact.

decisions.title: Backup plan stops at short-term recovery
decisions.note: User deferred; retain 7-day PITR + 30-day blob soft-delete for MVP. Gap vs REQ-C-02 7-year retention explicitly carried as open risk into Step 5 handoff.

decisions.title: Alert set misses availability/auth/PE/budget signals
decisions.note: alerts.bicep expanded with 2 webtests + availability alerts, auth-failure scheduledQueryRule, PE/DNS health KQL, budget-aligned action group wiring.

decisions.title: AllLogs diagnostics lack ingestion controls
decisions.note: observability.bicep adds dailyQuotaGb=5, AI samplingPercentage=25, noisy-category exclusions documented, two ingestion-cap scheduledQueryRules at 80%/100%.

decisions.title: SQL grant script not idempotent
decisions.note: sqlgrant.bicep script body wraps CREATE USER and ALTER ROLE statements with IF NOT EXISTS / sys.database_principals + database_role_members checks so re-runs are safe.

decisions.title: Rollback guidance deletes deployment records, not resources
decisions.note: Phase Failure Recovery table updated: explicit reverse-dependency deletion order; az deployment sub delete guidance replaced with per-resource cleanup; RG retained because of tag-Deny policy expense.
